sections.brandStoryDesc: QINMU (沁木) is a K-beauty brand crafted with pure, nature-inspired ingredients. We believe the deep resonance of nature seeps into your skin, allowing everyone to bloom into their own unique beauty.

footer.copyright: © 2026 QINMU 沁木國際. All rights reserved.

auth.agreeTerms: I agree to the Terms of Service
auth.agreePrivacy: I agree to the Privacy Policy
auth.completeMessage: Welcome! Your account has been created.
auth.termsContent:
Article 1 (Purpose)
These Terms govern the rights, obligations, and responsibilities between QINMU (hereinafter 'Company') and users regarding the use of services provided by the Company.

Article 2 (Definitions)
1. 'Service' refers to all online services provided by the Company.
2. 'User' refers to members and non-members who use the Service in accordance with these Terms.
3. 'Member' refers to a person who has registered by providing personal information to the Company.

Article 3 (Effectiveness and Changes)
1. These Terms apply to all users who wish to use the Service.
2. The Company may amend these Terms as necessary, and amended Terms take effect after notice within the Service.

Article 4 (Provision of Service)
1. The Company provides the following services:
   - Product information and purchasing
   - Member management
   - Other services determined by the Company

Article 5 (Membership Registration)
1. Users apply for membership in accordance with the procedures set by the Company.
2. The Company registers users as members unless they fall under specific disqualifying conditions.
auth.privacyContent:
1. Purpose of Collection and Use of Personal Information
The Company collects and uses personal information for the following purposes:
- Membership registration and management: Member identification, membership services
- Service provision: Product purchase, delivery, payment
- Marketing and advertising: Event information, personalized services

2. Items of Personal Information Collected
- Required: Name, email address, password
- Optional: Phone number, shipping address

3. Retention Period
Personal information is retained until membership withdrawal. Where required by law, it is stored for the legally mandated period.
- Records of contracts or subscription withdrawal: 5 years
- Records of payment and supply of goods: 5 years
- Records of consumer complaints or disputes: 3 years

4. Provision to Third Parties
The Company does not provide personal information to external parties without user consent.

5. User Rights
Users may view, modify, or delete their personal information at any time, and may request membership withdrawal.

about.title: The QINMU Story
about.missionDesc: To provide the best skincare with pure, nature-derived ingredients so everyone can feel confident in their own skin.
about.value1Desc: We use only pure ingredients derived from nature.
about.value2Desc: We openly share all ingredients and manufacturing processes.
about.value3Desc: We pursue eco-friendly beauty together with the earth.
